zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford於1362年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾巴德比時，他的父親Nicholas De Spencer36歲，母親Joan Pollard19歲。他於1362年與Dorothy Despencer在英國諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他在英國格盧斯特斯爾被列為fighting in the english army and governing gloucestershire.。他去世於1435年在他的家鄉享年73歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾霍德爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford于1362年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾巴德比时，他的父亲Nicholas De Spencer36岁，母亲Joan Pollard19岁。他于1362年与Dorothy Despencer在英国諾薩普頓史爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他在英国格盧斯特斯爾被列为fighting in the english army and governing gloucestershire.。他去世于1435年在他的家乡享年73岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾霍德爾。

nameMeanings.name: Spencer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): occupational name for someone who dispensed provisions or money, from Middle English spenser(e), spencer(e) ‘household steward, butler, almoner’ (Anglo-Norman French espenser, Old French despensier). Compare Spence and Spender . There is some dispute about the origins of the Spencer family, whose most famous member in recent times was the late Princess of Wales, born Lady Diana Spencer (1961–97). Some sources say that they are descended from William the Conqueror's steward, Robert Despencer. What is clear is that by the 15th century they had become prosperous from sheep farming in Northamptonshire. Robert Spencer (died 1627) was said to be the wealthiest man in England. Their titles have included Earls of Sunderland and Earls Spencer; and through the female line the 5th Earl of Sunderland also became Duke of Marlborough in 1733. This connection was the result of the marriage, in 1700, of the 3rd Duke of Sunderland to the daughter of John Churchill, 1st Duke of Marlborough. The youngest son of this union, John Spencer (1708–46), was the father of the 1st Earl Spencer (1734–83).

variants.name: Spence
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a servant employed in the pantry of a great house or monastery, from Middle English spense, spence ‘pantry, larder, storeroom’ (Old French despense, from a Late Latin derivative of dispendere, past participle dispensus ‘to weigh out or dispense’). Compare Spencer .

variants.name: Spender
meanings: occupational name or status name from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘steward, treasurer’, a shortened form of Middle English, Old French despendour, denoting someone who managed money or supplies. Compare Spencer .
alternatively, perhaps a nickname from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘spender (of money), spendthrift’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford was born in 1362, in Badby, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Nicholas De Spencer, was 36 and his mother, Joan Pollard, was 19. He married Dorothy Despencer in 1362, in Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as fighting in the english army and governing gloucestershire. in Gloucestershire, England. He died in 1435, in his hometown, at the age of 73, and was buried in Hodnell, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford est né en 1362, à Badby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas De Spencer, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Joan Pollard, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Dorothy Despencer en 1362, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est fighting in the english army and governing gloucestershire. à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1435, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Hodnell, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford 1362 in Badby, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas De Spencer 36 und seine Mutter Joan Pollard 19. Er hat 1362 in Northamptonshire, England Dorothy Despencer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als fighting in the english army and governing gloucestershire. in Gloucestershire, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1435 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Hodnell, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford è nato il nel 1362 nel Badby, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas De Spencer, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Joan Pollard, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Dorothy Despencer nel 1362, nel Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come fighting in the english army and governing gloucestershire. nel Gloucestershire, England. Morì nel 1435, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Hodnell, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Spencer of Deffordが1362年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーで生まれた時，父Nicholas De Spencerは36歳，母Joan Pollardは19歳であった。1362年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでDorothy Despencerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでの職業はfighting in the english army and governing gloucestershire.と記録されている。彼は1435年に故郷で73歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアホードネルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford(이)가 1362년 영국 노르섬프토실르 바드비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas De Spencer(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Pollard(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1362년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 Dorothy Despencer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 그루스스터실르에서 fighting in the english army and governing gloucestershire.이었다. 그는 1435년 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 호드넬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford nasceu em 1362, em Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas De Spencer, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Joan Pollard, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothy Despencer em 1362, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como fighting in the english army and governing gloucestershire. em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1435, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Hodnell, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford родился в 1362 г. в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas De Spencer было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Pollard, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Despencer в 1362 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии fighting in the english army and governing gloucestershire. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. Он умер в 1435 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности ходнелл, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford nació en 1362, en Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas De Spencer, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Joan Pollard, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Dorothy Despencer en 1362, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era fighting in the english army and governing gloucestershire. en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1435, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Hodnell, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
